content.speakerText: I can give you an extra week, but you need to show me a revision plan by Thursday.
content.speakerTextCn: 我可以多给你一周，但周四前得交修改计划。
expectedAnswers: That works! I'll create a detailed timeline with milestones for each chapter and email it by Thursday afternoon.
Thank you so much! I'll make sure to outline the key edits and send it before Thursday.
Okay, I'll get started right away and send you the plan by Thursday.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确接受延期条件并承诺提交修订计划
语言准确性：语法正确，用词恰当，无严重错误
表达自然度：使用符合口语习惯的表达，如 'get started', 'make sure to', 'email it'
关键词覆盖：是否包含 'revision plan', 'Thursday', 'timeline' 或类似关键词

content.speakerText: I understand your situation, but I need to see a clear plan before approving any extension. What will your revision schedule look like?
content.speakerTextCn: 我理解你的情况，但在批准延期前，我需要看到一个清晰的计划。你的修改时间表会是什么样的？
expectedAnswers: I'll break the work into three phases: first, I'll revise the methodology section by Tuesday; then the results by Wednesday; and finally the discussion and references by Thursday.
I'm planning to focus on the core arguments first, then polish the language and citations. I'll send you a daily checklist so you can track my progress.
I'll prioritize the sections you mentioned last time and submit a marked-up draft with comments explaining each change by Thursday.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否提供具体、可执行的修订计划，而非模糊承诺
语言准确性：使用恰当的时态、动词搭配（break into, prioritize, submit a draft）
表达自然度：结构清晰，有逻辑连接词（first, then, finally），符合口语表达习惯
关键词覆盖：是否包含 'revision schedule', 'phase', 'section', 'submit', 'Thursday' 等关键词
